channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: What to watch in Tuesday’s primaries as Democrats try to defend California and make inroads in Iowa
item.description: Democrats are trying to defend California and make inroads in Iowa in primary elections. California’s governor’s race is lacking star power this year.

item.title: From festering infections to untreated cancer, ICE detainees across the US describe medical neglect
Former North Carolina officer charged in beating caught on doorbell camera video
